---
title: "Validation"
subtitle: "Functions for validating the eData format"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{references_data}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    collapse: true
    comment: '#>'
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(eDataDRF)
```
